title: hieracium racemosum subsp. italicum
intro: Hieracium racemosum subsp. italicum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family that belongs to the genus Hieracium, commonly known as hawkweeds. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium racemosum subsp. italicum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Hieracium racemosum subsp. italicum is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its roots and leaves are used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
